violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicers on the clean rack in the back were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed slicers in 3 bay to be properly sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The soap dispenser in the back area was observed in poor repair. Soap dispenser to be fixed or replaced to allow adequate dispensing of soap. The 3-bay sink spray hose was observed taped up with paper towels. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Tape and paper towels to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Cold water was unavailable at all sinks. Per PIC, technician will service cold water within next 5-7 business. PIC to email inspector with proof of service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back prep area. (Dispenser was broken an unable to dispense soap.) Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Various foods were observed held at 50-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC unit was stocked less than 2 hours ago. All items were relocated to walk-in to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Chicken was observed thawing in stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Food was moved into walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Prep Unit located in the front area was not in good repair. Unable to hold food 41 degrees or below. Unit was taken out of service. Unit must not be used until serviced/repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Cold water was unavailable at all sinks. Per Walmart manager (Walmart is in charge of plumbing) technician will service all sinks today. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives and dough cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items moved to warewashing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The 3-bay sink was observed missing the proper drain plug 2) The faucet of the food prep sink observed with a leak New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the magnetic knife rack, fan cover of the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust and food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
